blockingIssues.description: Example plugin package `typecheck` scripts now call `scripts/ensure-plugin-build-deps.mjs`, which skips rebuilding `@papierklammer/shared` and `@papierklammer/plugin-sdk` whenever their `dist` outputs already exist. That lets standalone example-package typechecks succeed against stale generated declarations after local SDK/shared source edits, weakening the direct example validation the feature said it would preserve.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that the UI router wrapper auto-prefixes absolute `useNavigate()` targets with the active company, so route-sync fixes may need raw router navigation to avoid stale company prefixes during canonical redirects.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Relax the mandatory tests-first step for baseline-stabilization and build-ordering features so workers may begin with command-level reproduction when the assigned task is to repair an already failing baseline or diagnose a build-ordering issue.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both `stabilize-gemini-and-manual-unblock-baseline-tests` and `stabilize-plugin-sdk-typecheck-ordering` recorded justified deviations because the current backend-worker procedure requires writing tests first even when the assignment is to restore an already failing validator or diagnose a build-ordering issue.
